root.rep_text: รายงานเช็ค - โอน (ตามสถานะ)

begining_of_contract.text: เริ่มวันที่

loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,sc_com_m_branch.branch_name , '' as coll_description ---การค้ำ , (select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code ) ||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name ||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ||':'||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no as group_memno , (select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no) as member_group_name , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount , (select sum(sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret.fund_ret) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret where sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no) as fund_ret --กองทุเก่า , (select sum(sc_lon_m_req_fund_new.fund_add) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_new where sc_lon_m_req_fund_new.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no) as fund_add --กองทุนใหม่ , '' as insure --ค่าเบี้ยประกัน , '' as cream_amount --ค่า ฌปนกิจ , sc_lon_m_loan_request.interest_first , sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share , sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve
, sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_old_loan , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_com_m_branch WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_code is null ) or( sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_code = '' ) ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_acc_no is null) or ( sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_acc_no = '' ) ) and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and (sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no) and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.branch_id = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id and (sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status = '1') and(sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.type_pay_money in ( 'CHQ','TRB') ) -- เฉพาะ เช็คและโอน -- and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract between to_date('2018-10-1 0:0:0','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and to_date('2018-10-4 0:0:0','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') -- and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = '01' -- and sc_lon_m_loan_request.branch_id = '01'
/*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_lon_m_loan_request.branch_id ASC, sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ASC, sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ASC

r_ktm_loan_wait_approved_cheuqe_conno_ne.sql: select SUBSTR(loan_contract_no,0,2)||'-'||SUBSTR(loan_contract_no,3,2 )||'-'||SUBSTR(loan_contract_no,5,5) AS loan_contract_no , principal_balance_of_loan , interest_amount from sc_lon_m_loan_history WHERE 1=1 AND sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = {0} /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no
